paper_title: One Embedder, Any Task: Instruction-Finetuned Text Embeddings

extraction_data.innovation: INSTRUCTOR introduces a novel approach to generating task-aware embeddings by incorporating task instructions alongside the input text. This method enables a single model to adapt to various downstream tasks without extensive fine-tuning. The key innovation lies in the instruction-based approach, allowing for more flexible and efficient training across diverse tasks.
extraction_data.extension: INSTRUCTOR uses a single encoder to generate embeddings tailored to specific tasks given the input text along with task instructions. It does not require separate encoders for each task and instead leverages a contrastive loss function to optimize for task-aware representations.
